body_txt: A Subtrope of Big Eater and Extreme Omnivore in which a character (sometimes more) eats a massive portion of food, sometimes much bigger than they are, really fast. Some cartoons even give the act a sound effect like that of a power saw or woodchipper. In animated works, termites/beavers and piranhas are almost always depicted as buzzing their way through any amount of (respectively) wood or large prey in a matter of seconds. Reducing them to piles of sawdust or tiny bits of flesh. Often used by the Horde of Alien Locusts , if smaller than human size, to horrifying effect, leaving only bones in their wake . This trope may be justified by Too Hungry to Be Polite . Compare Typewriter Eating . Sub-Trope of Metaphoric Metamorphosis . Contrast Sawblade Anatomy for creatures or characters that genuinely have saws attached to their bodies.
